tools.name: tienda_nube_get_store
tools.description: Retrieve metadata about the bound Tienda Nube store.

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_products
tools.description: Cursor-paginated product list with substring search.

tools.name: tienda_nube_get_product
tools.description: Retrieve a product by id, including all variants.

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_orders
tools.description: List orders with status, payment_status, email, and date filters.

tools.name: tienda_nube_get_order
tools.description: Retrieve a single order by id.

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_customers
tools.description: Cursor-paginated customer list with name+email substring search.

tools.name: tienda_nube_get_customer
tools.description: Retrieve a single customer by id.

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_webhooks
tools.description: List webhook subscriptions for this app on the bound store.

tools.name: tienda_nube_create_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook subscription. URL must be https://.

tools.name: tienda_nube_delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a webhook subscription by id. Idempotent.
